finalizing-upload: Putting the final touches... just a moment!
my-resources-description: Resources are services that give you access to external tools for learning and building projects.

llm.title: LLM API Keys
llm.description: LLM API keys are credentials that let you make AI requests to multiple models through a unified AI gateway, including a free monthly budget that applies to your request usage.
llm.no-keys: You don't have any LLM API keys yet.
llm.no-consumable: To use this feature, get a plan that includes the Free Monthly LLM Budget.
llm.load-error: We couldn't load your API keys.
llm.action-error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
llm.key-copy-error: Couldn't copy key. Please copy it manually.

key-details.host-description: Base URL of the LLM gateway. Use this host when making requests with this key.
key-details.models-description: A model determines which AI system handles supported requests. You can specify one of these model identifiers when calling the service with this key.

llm.no-plans: You don't have any active plans or purchased LLM credits.

generate-modal.title: Generate LLM API Key
generate-modal.plan-label: Plan whose monthly free budget covers this key’s usage
generate-modal.description: Enter a name for your key.
generate-modal.purchased-credit-expiry-alert: This key will be created with your purchased LLM credit. The credit expires on {{date}}. If you do not have another LLM credit from any source in this academy before that date, we will deprovision your keys.
generate-modal.token-warning: For security, this value will only be shown once.

delete-modal.title: Delete API key
delete-modal.description: Are you sure you want to delete this API key?

vps.title: VPS Servers
vps.description: VPS (Virtual Private Servers) are remote cloud machines where you can deploy projects, run backend services, and practice real-world DevOps workflows.
vps.no-vps: You don't have any VPS yet.
vps.load-error: We couldn't load your VPS servers.
vps.action-error: Something went wrong while requesting the VPS.

delete.title: Delete VPS?
delete.body: This will destroy the server. This action cannot be undone.
delete.error: We could not delete this VPS.
delete.credit-regenerates-alert: After the deletion, the consumable used to create this VPS will be regenerated so you can request another one.
delete.no-credit-return-alert: We won’t regenerate the consumable used to create this VPS. If you don’t already have another VPS credit, you may need to wait until your plan’s next billing cycle to request another.

graceful.title: Graceful restart
graceful.description: Asks the OS to shut down cleanly and boot again. Prefer this when the machine responds normally.

forced.title: Forced restart
forced.description: Cuts power and turns the machine back on. Processes and services stop immediately, which may increase the risk of data corruption if something was writing to disk. Useful if the server is frozen or not responding to a graceful restart.

restart.success: Restart was started. The server may be unavailable for a short time.

modal.title: Request VPS
modal.description: Choose the provider and configuration for your VPS.
modal.load-providers-error: We couldn't load the VPS providers for your academy.
modal.load-options-error: We couldn't load the options for this provider.
modal.no-providers: Your academy does not have any VPS providers configured.
modal.select-provider-heading: Select a provider for your VPS
modal.plan-label: Select the plan that will cover this VPS
modal.plans-and-credits-label: Select plan or purchased credit for this VPS
modal.purchased-credit-expiry-alert: Your VPS will be deprovisioned on {{date}} when the purchased credit used to create it expires.
modal.options-disabled-region: Some choices are disabled because they are not available for the region you selected.
modal.options-disabled-size: Some sizes are disabled because they are not offered in the region you selected.
modal.options-disabled-unavailable: Some choices are marked as unavailable by the provider right now.
modal.options-disabled-mixed: Some choices are disabled because of your selected region or because the provider marked them unavailable.
modal.option-disabled-tooltip-region: Not available for the selected region
modal.option-disabled-tooltip-size: This size is not offered in the selected region
modal.no-options-schema: This provider does not define configurable options.
modal.missing-selection: Please select all required options before requesting the VPS.

no-certificates: There are no certificates to show yet, finish your final project and get it immediately
update-failed: Something went wrong updating your profile
connected-with-rigobot: You are connected to Rigo AI
rigobot-requires-github-connection: You must sync with GitHub to use Rigobot

remove-github-modal.title: Remove Github account
remove-github-modal.description: By removing your Github account, any Github login will be unlinked; however, you will be able to sync it again, if you wish

remove-google-modal.title: Remove Google account
remove-google-modal.description: By removing your Google account, any Google login will be unlinked; however, you will be able to sync it again, if you wish

share-certificate.title: Share your new career title
share-certificate.shareMessage: I have successfully finished the "{{profession}}" certification at 4Geeks

subscription.bootcamp-mentorships: You have unlimited access to those mentorship services with this icon ∞ because you belong to the bootcamp
subscription.no-consumables-available: You do not have {{service}} sessions available
subscription.payment-difference-note: Your next charge may differ from your last payment because the plan price changed or your discount no longer applies.
subscription.plan-not-available: This plan is no longer available. Please contact support for assistance.

cancel-modal.title: Cancel subscription
cancel-modal.description: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? This means your subscription will still be accessible until {{nextPaymentDate}}. until this date you will also be able to reactivate it.

no-subscriptions: There are no subscriptions to show yet, subscribe to a cohort and get it immediately
referral-step-1: 1. Share your coupon code with friends and family
referral-step-2: 2. When someone uses your coupon and makes a payment at any 4Geeks programs, you'll get a 10% or $350 discount (whichever is lower) on your next payment,
referral-step-3: 3. The more people use your coupon, the more discounts you'll receive!
referral-step-4: 4. This referral program only applies to self-paced programs
coupon-already-used: This coupon was already used or is not valid
referral-refer-friend-button: Refer a friend and make money
referral-share-description: Share your coupon code with friends and family and make money while you learn!
referral-share-coupon-text: Share this coupon with your friends:
referral-share-message: Check out this learning opportunity with my referral code! Join 4Geeks Academy and start your coding journey using my discount code, available here:
no-reward-coupons: You don't have reward coupons, refer your code to a friend and get discounts on your next payments

team-seats.title: Team seats
team-seats.description: Manage who has access to the seats included in your plan and see what services you are sharing with each member.
team-seats.cohort-label: Select a cohort to assign to the invitee
team-seats.cohort-required: Please select a cohort for this member.
team-seats.no-cohorts-available: You have no cohorts available to share with this plan.
team-seats.seats-limit-reached: You have reached the seat limit for this plan.
team-seats.empty-state: You don't have plans with manageable team seats.
team-seats.load-error: We couldn't load your team seats.
team-seats.invalid-email: Please enter a valid email address.
team-seats.add-error: Could not add the seat. Please try again.
team-seats.remove-error: Could not remove the seat. Please try again.

consumption-strategy.per-seat: Each member receives their own quota of these services.
consumption-strategy.per-team: All team members share these consumables.
consumption-strategy.per-seat-description: With a per-seat strategy, every team member gets an individual allocation of the services included in your plan. Usage by one member does not reduce what others have available.
consumption-strategy.per-team-description: With a per-team strategy, all members draw from the same shared pool of consumables. When someone uses a service, it reduces the balance available for the entire team.

remove-modal.title: Remove team member
remove-modal.description: Are you sure you want to remove {{email}} from your team? They will lose access to the shared plan benefits.
